easy.title: First Negative Number Finder
easy.description: Return first negative number in list using loop with break.

medium.title: Filter and Sum Positive Evens
medium.description: Sum all positive even numbers, skipping odd and negative numbers using continue.
hints: Use continue to skip unwanted numbers

hard.title: First Non-Repeating Character
hard.description: Find first character in string that does not repeat. Return its index or -1.
hints: Build frequency table first, then search in order

debugging.title: Fix Broken Search Loop
debugging.description: Fix pass vs continue in filter loop.
bugs: `pass` did not skip printing negative items. Replaced with `continue`.
